items.body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `src/api/purviewManagementContext.ts:39`

```ts
const userAgentInfo = `azsdk-js-arm-purview/1.0.0-beta.1`;
```

The `userAgentInfo` string reports version `1.0.0-beta.1`, but `package.json` declares version `2.0.0-beta.1`. These must be consistent. The `//metadata.constantPaths` entry in `package.json` should instruct the generation tooling to keep this value in sync, but it was not updated correctly.

**Fix:** Update the `userAgentInfo` string to `azsdk-js-arm-purview/2.0.0-beta.1` to match the package version, and report this inconsistency in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

1 tool issue found in this PR (`@azure/arm-purview` `2.0.0-beta.1`). The `userAgentInfo` string in `src/api/purviewManagementContext.ts` (line 39) reports version `1.0.0-beta.1` while `package.json` declares `2.0.0-beta.1` — these must be kept in sync by the `//metadata.constantPaths` mechanism but the generation tooling did not update it. The public API surface and naming look clean: no `_N`/`AutoGenerated` suffix collisions, no problematic `unknown` types, no alpha versions in the changelog, and the changelog correctly compares against the previous stable `1.1.0` release.

<details>


</details>
